title: Login page error
description: Customer cannot log into the account using correct credentials.

title: Payment failed during checkout
description: Payment gateway shows an error while completing the order.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Customer requested password reset but did not receive email.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Customer unable to upload profile picture.

title: Order history not loading
description: Order history page keeps loading without showing any data.

title: App crashes on startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening.

title: Discount code not working
description: Customer tried using a valid promo code but it failed.

title: Website loading very slow
description: Pages take too long to load for the customer.

title: Unable to update shipping address
description: Customer cannot change the shipping address in profile settings.

title: Notification emails not sending
description: System is not sending order confirmation emails.

title: Search function not returning results
description: Search bar shows no results even for valid keywords.

title: Account verification issue
description: Customer cannot verify email after registration.

title: Cart items disappearing
description: Products added to cart disappear after refreshing the page.

title: Language switch not working
description: Website language does not change after selecting a new language.

title: Invoice download error
description: Customer cannot download invoice from order details.
